items.summary: New hyperscale data centers can't set up shop in New York for up to a year now that Governor Kathy Hochul (D) has signed the nation's first statewide moratorium. But a bill passed by the state legislature that could restrict even more developments still awaits her signature. The order blocks new…

items.summary: 韋黛琴（Ann Widdecombe）上週在德文郡家中被發現身亡。她生前是英國改革黨（Reform UK）發言人，在此之前於保守黨歷任政府或影子內閣不同職位。
